payload.description: Approved the exact V0 compatibility window, indefinite no-auto-delete local archive retention, bridge-asset retention, and Phase 8 eligibility policy.
payload.impact: Gate G0 may open after Decision 0012 is recorded; Phase 1 contract work is authorized.

payload.notes: Human-approved on 2026-07-17; Phase 8 remains separately authorized.
payload.predicted_impact: A fixed support and retention policy opens Phase 1 without silently shortening migration safety.
payload.title: V0 Compatibility Window And Retention
payload.verify_command: test -s docs/decisions/0012-v0-compatibility-window-and-retention.md && rg -q '2027-01-01T00:00:00Z' docs/decisions/0012-v0-compatibility-window-and-retention.md && rg -q '2027-12-31T23:59:59Z' docs/decisions/0012-v0-compatibility-window-and-retention.md && rg -q '2028-06-30T23:59:59Z' docs/decisions/0012-v0-compatibility-window-and-retention.md && rg -q '2028-01-01T00:00:00Z' docs/decisions/0012-v0-compatibility-window-and-retention.md && git diff --check

test -s docs/stories/US-105-harness-v1-implementation/overview.md && test -s docs/stories/US-105-harness-v1-implementation/design.md && test -s docs/stories/US-105-harness-v1-implementation/execplan.md && test -s docs/stories/US-105-harness-v1-implementation/validation.md && rg -q '^### Phase 8:' docs/stories/US-105-harness-v1-implementation/execplan.md && rg -q 'Current state: approved/open by Decision 0012' docs/stories/US-105-harness-v1-implementation/execplan.md && git diff --check
